arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract preference clear after Liverpool team-mate reaction
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah celebrated Liverpool's opening goal vs Lille with team-mate Curtis Jones

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-1 Lille: Player ratings as Elliott extends Reds' perfect Champions League record
arts.sum: Curtis Jones strode on to the loose ball and threaded it through the scattered white shirts, splitting Lille open and teeing Mohamed Salah up for a one-on-one with Lucas Chevalier. Liverpool ultimately eased to a 2-1 Champions League victory at home to a Lille side reduced to ten players on Tuesday, extending their faultless record in Europe's premier club competition to seven straight wins this season.

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott makes big claim on Liverpool future amid transfer exit links
arts.sum: Reds star makes impact off the bench again in 2-1 win Champions League win over Lille

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Barcelona handed easier route to Champions League final after wins
arts.sum: Liverpool and Barcelona have both advanced to the Champions League last-16 after their wins on Wednesday evening, and the pair will now be top seeds in the knockouts

arts.sum: Liverpool made it seven wins in a row in the Champions League to ensure their progress as group phase winners thanks to their victory over...

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-1 Lille: Match report & talking points as Reds secure Champions League last 16 spot
arts.sum: Match report and three key talking points from Liverpool 2-1 Lille.

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott fends off 10-man Lille to leave Liverpool in seventh heaven
arts.sum: Liverpool and Mohamed Salah march on with ease. Arne Slot’s team secured a place in the knockout phase of the Champions League with victory over Lille, on the night Salah became the first player in Liverpool’s illustrious history to score 50 European goals. Top of the Champions League and the Premier League, the six-time champions will fear no one in the last 16. Liverpool needed only one point from their final two group games to guarantee a place in the knockout rounds, a place that has never once looked in doubt, and took all three courtesy of Salah’s instinctive finish and Harvey Elliott’s deflected strike. Victory equalled Liverpool’s best sequence in the Champions League era of seven straight wins, first set in 2021/22. Slot’s team also created a new club record for most minutes without conceding in Europe, surpassing the 572 set by Rafael Benítez’s team in 2005-06. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool edge Lille, confirm UCL top 8 spot
arts.sum: Liverpool booked their spot in the Champions League round-of-16 with a 2-1 victory over 10-man Lille on Tuesday at Anfield, thanks to goals from talisman Mohamed Salah and substitute Harvey Elliott.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Mohamed Salah drops clearest hint yet over Liverpool contract decision
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah inspired Liverpool to a win over Lille on Tuesday night and after the game, the superstar attacker dropped another hint on his future at the Reds, with his contract expiring this summer
